SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement is made and entered into on the 15th day of October, 2023.

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. Jonathan Lee (NRIC No. S1234567A)
   Address: 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 238888
   Phone: +65 6234 5678
   Email: jonathan.lee@example.sg

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC No. S2345678B)
   Address: 456 Bukit Timah Road, #08-76, Singapore 259999
   Phone: +65 6123 4567
   Email: siti.aishah@example.sg

AND:

3. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC No. S3456789C)
   Address: 789 Serangoon Road, #10-11, Singapore 328888
   Phone: +65 6345 6789
   Email: ramasamy.muthu@example.sg

Company: Bright Future Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 201234567A)
Address: 101 Raffles Place, #20-01, Singapore 048623

WHEREAS, the shareholders wish to regulate the affairs of the Company and their respective rights and obligations as shareholders.

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements herein contained and other good and valuable consideration, the parties agree as follows:

1. The initial capital contribution by each shareholder shall be as follows:
   - Dr. Jonathan Lee: SGD 50,000
   - Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah: SGD 75,000
   - Ramasamy Muthu: SGD 25,000

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Shareholders Agreement on the day and year first above written.
